rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §8.057 governs criminal history record information assistance via regional education service centers. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The agency may require a regional education service center to assist in collecting information needed for a criminal history record information review under Subchapter C, Chapter 22.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this criminal history record information provision.
